query.disease: benign neoplasm of floor of mouth

data.title: A Phase I Trial of Bevacizumab, Temsirolimus Alone and in Combination With Valproic Acid, or Cetuximab in Patients With Advanced Malignancy and Other Indications
data.brief_summary: This phase I trial studies the side effects and best dose of bevacizumab and temsirolimus alone or in combination with valproic acid or cetuximab in treating patients with a malignancy that has spread to other places in the body or other disease that is not cancerous. Immunotherapy with bevacizumab and cetuximab, may induce changes in body's immune system and may interfere with the ability of tumor cells to grow and spread. Temsirolimus may stop the growth of tumor cells by blocking some of the

Inclusion Criteria:

endpoints: Maximum tolerated dose (MTD) of bevacizumab, defined as the dose level below the dose at which 2 of 6 patients experience drug-related dose limiting toxicity (DLT)
MTD of temsirolimus, defined as the dose level below the dose at which 2 of 6 patients experience DLT
